achievements.title: Built S3 Library Platform from Problem to Validation
achievements.description: Designed and built a SaaS platform after identifying real operational inefficiencies in local libraries.
highlights: Handled end-to-end development: backend, frontend, database, and deployment.
Focused on real workflows like subscriptions, seat allocation, and branch operations.
Gained insights into product-market fit, user behavior, and adoption challenges.

achievements.title: Expanded into IoT and Embedded Systems
achievements.description: Extended from software engineering into hardware systems through hands-on embedded development.
highlights: Working with Arduino, ESP8266/ESP32, sensors, and device communication.
Applying learning through small experiments and practical projects.

achievements.title: Developed Multi-Mode RC Car System
achievements.description: Built an RC car system with manual, obstacle avoidance, and line-following modes.
highlights: Implemented motor control, sensors, and Bluetooth communication.
Structured modular control logic for different operation modes.
Extended system toward WiFi-based control using ESP8266.

achievements.title: Worked on Production SaaS Backends
achievements.description: Contributed to backend systems for SaaS applications including APIs, payments, and workflows.
highlights: Built REST APIs for core business modules.
Integrated Stripe and Razorpay with secure webhook handling.
Improved system reliability, structure, and maintainability.

achievements.title: Built Real-Time Systems Beyond CRUD
achievements.description: Developed real-time applications to explore event-driven architecture and multi-user interaction.
highlights: Implemented WebSocket-based communication and state synchronization.
Handled multi-user interaction and responsiveness challenges.
Strengthened architectural thinking beyond standard request-response systems.
